_meta.purpose: Wave 0 (Plan 04-00 Task 3) realm patch. Adds the audience mapper on the tbe-b2c client (Pitfall 4) and provisions the tbe-b2c-admin service client with manage-users role (Pitfall 8). Import with `kc.sh import --file infra/keycloak/realm-tbe-b2c.json` or merge into infra/keycloak/realms/tbe-b2c-realm.json.
_meta.supersedes: infra/keycloak/realms/tbe-b2c-realm.json (partial — this file adds audience mapper + admin client)

clients._comment: B2C customer OIDC client consumed by src/portals/b2c-web via Auth.js v5 (D-04).

protocolMappers._comment: Pitfall 4 fix — emits aud=tbe-api on access tokens so YARP JwtBearer can validate.
protocolMappers.name: tbe-api-audience

clients._comment: Pitfall 8 fix — dedicated service client for admin operations (send-verify-email, password reset). client_credentials grant; secret kept out of the browser bundle (no NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix).

realm-management._comment: Service-account role binding — allows tbe-b2c-admin to call Keycloak Admin REST API send-verify-email / users endpoints (Pitfall 8).
